name: Foxlore
short_description: Foxlore is a surreal puzzle-adventure game following Filo, a fox who discovers an ancient relic shrouded in mystery and imbued with immeasurable power. Navigate through a world in decay, solve intricate puzzles, and unravel the story that binds the fate of Filo to the powerful relic.
detailed_description:
A Message From the Developer

Hey, thanks for checking Foxlore out! <3

As you may know, this is my first standalone game I've ever made. There was a large amount of learning and experimenting that went into making Foxlore! Because of this, you may experience a few visual glitches. While none of these should be game-breaking, much of the code is too easy to break for me to dive back into in an attempt to fix this. I understand this may distort the experience and because of this I will permanently reduce Foxlore's price from $9.99 USD to $6.99 USD at the end of the 2025 steam winter sale!

Thank you for supporting my passion as I learn how to bring my dreams to life,
@FiloTheFloof


About the Game


FOXLORE follows the adventure of Filo, a cunning fox who stumbles upon a mysterious map leading to an ancient relic of untold power. As Filo unravels the secrets of the relic, he uncovers hidden truths that could change the fate of his world forever.


Navigate through a world in decay, meet new friends and familiar faces, and discover hidden clues to the mysteries at hand. Explore the rust belt, uncover the gothic fall from glory of the old world, learn the history of the new one, and unravel the rich story that binds the fate of Filo to the powerful relic.


As the secrets of the old world unravel, Filo encounters story-driven puzzles that stand in his way. Each puzzle is a key to unlocking the murky truth behind the ancient relic, challenging Filo at every turn.
